title: BURNSIDE SHELTER - 211info
text: PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER BURNSIDE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides overnight emergency shelter for men. Open spaces provided daily, as available. Spaces are maintained for guests who return nightly. 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: Lottery signup: 7 days per week 8am-4:30pm Lottery names posted: 5pm Shelter check in: 8pm Email (503) 906-7690 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 906-7690 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to sign up for the lottery. Randomly selected names are posted by 5pm daily, and those selected must return at 8pm for check in. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 6:45am-5pm and 5:45pm-6am TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: MAX red and blue lines, Skidmore Fountain stop. Near bus lines 12, 19, and 20 on the Burnside Bridge. Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Men Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - GUEST CARE HOUSING/SHELTER - MEN'S CONNECT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER
